_comment: RAT engine/v1 conformance vectors — ADR-003 shared golden data. The SINGLE source of truth for the engine axis's expected behavior. Every independent engine implementation's harness (Go: examples/engine/inmemory-go, Python: examples/engine/inmemory-py, ...) loads THIS file and drives its EngineService through these steps over real gRPC, asserting the expectations. Both impls passing the identical vectors from one shared artifact is how ADR-003's 'run against each other on golden data' is met literally. The references implement a deliberately tiny, fully-specified mini-SQL (see contracts/conformance/README.md) so two independent parsers stay in lockstep — the point under test is the engine WIRE contract (sql+tables -> WriteResult / ArrowStream, projection, WHERE, limit), not SQL fidelity.

lifecycle.sql: SELECT id, amount FROM orders WHERE region = west
SELECT id FROM orders WHERE region = east
